title: Wearable Items+
description: Put items/blocks with unique models in your head
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58e2f18579a23e9c10ec7481ec5c4f1f1c784ede_0.webp)

## Description
Wearable Items+ is a Data Pack/Mod that makes possible to wear a list of items/block on your helmet slot fully in survival mode through a simple craft recipe.

## Important notes
- Do not put your block on ground if is placeable or it will lose its properties
- If you remove the data pack, the items already made will NOT lose its properties
- No Resource Packs needed
- Only works in 1.21.2 or above
- Only the basic Decorated Pot works

## How it works
You only need to choose your item on the list below and put it on a craft grid with a leather cap (helmet) being a shapeless craft. After that, the item should show a "Wearable" tag.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99e74ac95c6a8dbdaeb172dc47f744c9b75ac923.png)

## Ominous Banner
Ominous Banner is the only item that needs an additional item to craft, it being a Ominous Bottle of any level.

![example2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f6e79d8feee88aa49b7c1c1e583a442374a99b.png)
